verses.latin_vulgate: Misit igitur Josue filius Nun de Setim duos viros exploratores in abscondito : et dixit eis : Ite, et considerate terram, urbemque Jericho. Qui pergentes ingressi sunt domum mulieris meretricis, nomine Rahab, et quieverunt apud eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֣ח יְהוֹשֻֽׁעַ־בִּן־נ֠וּן מִֽן־הַשִּׁטִּ֞ים שְׁנַֽיִם־אֲנָשִׁ֤ים מְרַגְּלִים֙ חֶ֣רֶשׁ לֵאמֹ֔ר לְכ֛וּ רְא֥וּ אֶת־הָאָ֖רֶץ וְאֶת־יְרִיח֑וֹ וַיֵּ֨לְכ֜וּ וַ֠יָּבֹ֠אוּ בֵּית־אִשָּׁ֥ה זוֹנָ֛ה וּשְׁמָ֥הּ רָחָ֖ב וַיִּשְׁכְּבוּ־שָֽׁמָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joshua, the son of Nun, sent from Setim two men, to spy secretly: and said to them: Go, and view the land, and the city of Jericho. They went, and entered into the house of a woman that was a harlot, named Rahab, and lodged with her.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Josua Nunin poika lähetti salaisesti kaksi vakoojaa Sittimistä, sanoen: menkäät ja katselkaat maata ja Jerihoa. Niin he läksivät matkaan ja tulivat porton huoneeseen, jonka nimi oli Rahab, ja lepäsivät siellä.
verses.king_james: And Joshua the son of Nun sent out of Shittim two men to spy secretly, saying, Go view the land, even Jericho. And they went, and came into an harlot’s house, named Rahab, and lodged there.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nuntiatumque est regi Jericho, et dictum : Ecce viri ingressi sunt huc per noctem de filiis Israël, ut explorarent terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֣אָמַ֔ר לְמֶ֥לֶךְ יְרִיח֖וֹ לֵאמֹ֑ר הִנֵּ֣ה אֲ֠נָשִׁ֠ים בָּ֣אוּ הֵ֧נָּה הַלַּ֛יְלָה מִבְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לַחְפֹּ֥ר אֶת־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it was told the king of Jericho, and was said: Behold there are men come in hither, by night, of the children of Israel, to spy the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta se ilmoitettiin Jerihon kuninkaalle, sanoen: katso, tänä yönä tulivat tänne miehet Israelin lapsista, vakoomaan maata.
verses.king_james: And it was told the king of Jericho, saying, Behold, there came men in hither to night of the children of Israel to search out the country.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misitque rex Jericho ad Rahab, dicens : Educ viros, qui venerunt ad te, et ingressi sunt domum tuam : exploratores quippe sunt, et omnem terram considerare venerunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַח֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ יְרִיח֔וֹ אֶל־רָחָ֖ב לֵאמֹ֑ר ה֠וֹצִ֠יאִי הָאֲנָשִׁ֨ים הַבָּאִ֤ים אֵלַ֙יִךְ֙ אֲשֶׁר־בָּ֣אוּ לְבֵיתֵ֔ךְ כִּ֛י לַחְפֹּ֥ר אֶת־כׇּל־הָאָ֖רֶץ בָּֽאוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the king of Jericho sent to Rahab, saying: Bring forth the men that came to thee, and are entered into thy house: for they are spies, and are come to view all the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin lähetti Jerihon kuningas Rahabin tykö, sanoen: tuo ne miehet ulos, jotka sinun tykös, sinun huoneesees tulivat, sillä he ovat tulleet vakoomaan kaikkea maata.
verses.king_james: And the king of Jericho sent unto Rahab, saying, Bring forth the men that are come to thee, which are entered into thine house: for they be come to search out all the country.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tollensque mulier viros, abscondit, et ait : Fateor, venerunt ad me, sed nesciebam unde essent :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּקַּ֧ח הָאִשָּׁ֛ה אֶת־שְׁנֵ֥י הָאֲנָשִׁ֖ים וַֽתִּצְפְּנ֑וֹ וַתֹּ֣אמֶר ׀ כֵּ֗ן בָּ֤אוּ אֵלַי֙ הָאֲנָשִׁ֔ים וְלֹ֥א יָדַ֖עְתִּי מֵאַ֥יִן הֵֽמָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the woman taking the men, hid them, and said: I confess they came to me, but I knew not whence they were:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta vaimo otti molemmat miehet ja kätki heidät, ja sanoi näin: miehet tulivat minun tyköni, vaan en minä tietänyt, kusta he olivat.
verses.king_james: And the woman took the two men, and hid them, and said thus, There came men unto me, but I wist not whence they were:

verses.latin_vulgate: cumque porta clauderetur in tenebris, et illi pariter exierunt ; nescio quo abierunt : persequimini cito, et comprehendetis eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֨י הַשַּׁ֜עַר לִסְגּ֗וֹר בַּחֹ֙שֶׁךְ֙ וְהָאֲנָשִׁ֣ים יָצָ֔אוּ לֹ֣א יָדַ֔עְתִּי אָ֥נָה הָלְכ֖וּ הָאֲנָשִׁ֑ים רִדְפ֥וּ מַהֵ֛ר אַחֲרֵיהֶ֖ם כִּ֥י תַשִּׂיגֽוּם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And at the time of shutting the gate in the dark, they also went out together. I know not whither they are gone: pursue after them quickly, and you will overtake them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin portti pimeässä pantiin kiinni, niin ne miehet läksivät ulos; enkä minä tiedä, kuhunka he menivät. Ajakaat nopiasti heitä takaa, niin heidät saatte kiinni.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass about the time of shutting of the gate, when it was dark, that the men went out: whither the men went I wot not: pursue after them quickly; for ye shall overtake them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipsa autem fecit ascendere viros in solarium domus suæ, operuitque eos stipula lini, quæ ibi erat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִ֖יא הֶעֱלָ֣תַם הַגָּ֑גָה וַֽתִּטְמְנֵם֙ בְּפִשְׁתֵּ֣י הָעֵ֔ץ הָעֲרֻכ֥וֹת לָ֖הּ עַל־הַגָּֽג׃
verses.douay_rheims: But she made the men go up to the top of her house, and covered them with the stalks of flax, which was there.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta hän oli käskenyt heidän astua katon päälle ja oli peittänyt heidät pellavain varsilla, jotka hän oli hajoittanut katolle.
verses.king_james: But she had brought them up to the roof of the house, and hid them with the stalks of flax, which she had laid in order upon the roof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hi autem, qui missi fuerant, secuti sunt eos per viam, quæ ducit ad vadum Jordanis : illisque egressis statim porta clausa est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָאֲנָשִׁ֗ים רָדְפ֤וּ אַֽחֲרֵיהֶם֙ דֶּ֣רֶךְ הַיַּרְדֵּ֔ן עַ֖ל הַֽמַּעְבְּר֑וֹת וְהַשַּׁ֣עַר סָגָ֔רוּ אַחֲרֵ֕י כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר יָצְא֥וּ הָרֹדְפִ֖ים אַחֲרֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now they that were sent, pursued after them, by the way that leadeth to the fords of the Jordan: and as soon as they were gone out, the gate was presently shut.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja miehet ajoivat heitä takaa, Jordanin tietä hamaan luotuspaikkaan; ja portti pantiin kiinni, sitte kohta kuin he läksivät, jotka heitä ajoivat takaa.
verses.king_james: And the men pursued after them the way to Jordan unto the fords: and as soon as they which pursued after them were gone out, they shut the gate.

verses.latin_vulgate: Necdum obdormierant qui latebant, et ecce mulier ascendit ad eos, et ait :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֵ֖מָּה טֶ֣רֶם יִשְׁכָּב֑וּן וְהִ֛יא עָלְתָ֥ה עֲלֵיהֶ֖ם עַל־הַגָּֽג׃
verses.douay_rheims: The men that were hid were not yet asleep, when behold the woman went up to them, and said:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta ennen kuin miehet panivat levätä, meni hän katolle heidän tykönsä,
verses.king_james: And before they were laid down, she came up unto them upon the roof;

verses.latin_vulgate: Novi quod Dominus tradiderit vobis terram : etenim irruit in nos terror vester, et elanguerunt omnes habitatores terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֹּ֙אמֶר֙ אֶל־הָ֣אֲנָשִׁ֔ים יָדַ֕עְתִּי כִּֽי־נָתַ֧ן יְהֹוָ֛ה לָכֶ֖ם אֶת־הָאָ֑רֶץ וְכִֽי־נָפְלָ֤ה אֵֽימַתְכֶם֙ עָלֵ֔ינוּ וְכִ֥י נָמֹ֛גוּ כׇּל־יֹשְׁבֵ֥י הָאָ֖רֶץ מִפְּנֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: I know that the Lord hath given this land to you: for the dread of you is fallen upon us, and all the inhabitants of the land have lost all strength.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi miehille: minä tiedän, että Herra antaa teille tämän maan; sillä teidän pelkonne on langennut meidän päällemme, ja koko maan asuvaiset ovat hämmästyneet teidän kasvoinne edessä.
verses.king_james: And she said unto the men, I know that the Lord hath given you the land, and that your terror is fallen upon us, and that all the inhabitants of the land faint because of you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audivimus quod siccaverit Dominus aquas maris Rubri ad vestrum introitum, quando egressi estis ex Ægypto : et quæ feceritis duobus Amorrhæorum regibus, qui erant trans Jordanem, Sehon et Og, quos interfecistis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י שָׁמַ֗עְנוּ אֵ֠ת אֲשֶׁר־הוֹבִ֨ישׁ יְהֹוָ֜ה אֶת־מֵ֤י יַם־סוּף֙ מִפְּנֵיכֶ֔ם בְּצֵאתְכֶ֖ם מִמִּצְרָ֑יִם וַאֲשֶׁ֣ר עֲשִׂיתֶ֡ם לִשְׁנֵי֩ מַלְכֵ֨י הָאֱמֹרִ֜י אֲשֶׁ֨ר בְּעֵ֤בֶר הַיַּרְדֵּן֙ לְסִיחֹ֣ן וּלְע֔וֹג אֲשֶׁ֥ר הֶחֱרַמְתֶּ֖ם אוֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: We have heard that the Lord dried up the water of the Red Sea, at your going in, when you came out of Egypt: and what things you did to the two kings of the Amorrhites, that were beyond the Jordan, Sehon and Og whom you slew.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä me olemme kuulleet, kuinka Herra kuivasi Punaisen meren vedet teidän edestänne lähteissänne Egyptistä, ja mitä te olette tehneet niille kahdelle Amorilaisten kuninkaalle, jotka olivat tuolla puolella Jordania, Sihonille ja Ogille, jotka te tapoitte.
verses.king_james: For we have heard how the Lord dried up the water of the Red sea for you, when ye came out of Egypt; and what ye did unto the two kings of the Amorites, that were on the other side Jordan, Sihon and Og, whom ye utterly destroyed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et hæc audientes pertimuimus, et elanguit cor nostrum, nec remansit in nobis spiritus ad introitum vestrum : Dominus enim Deus vester ipse est Deus in cælo sursum et in terra deorsum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַנִּשְׁמַע֙ וַיִּמַּ֣ס לְבָבֵ֔נוּ וְלֹא־קָ֨מָה ע֥וֹד ר֛וּחַ בְּאִ֖ישׁ מִפְּנֵיכֶ֑ם כִּ֚י יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵיכֶ֔ם ה֤וּא אֱלֹהִים֙ בַּשָּׁמַ֣יִם מִמַּ֔עַל וְעַל־הָאָ֖רֶץ מִתָּֽחַת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And at the hearing these things, we were affrighted, and our heart fainted away, neither did there remain any spirit in us, at your coming in: for the Lord your God he is God in heaven above, and in the earth beneath.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin me sen kuulimme, niin meidän sydämemme raukesi, ja ei ole yhdelläkään rohkeutta teidän edessänne; sillä Herra teidän Jumalanne on Jumala ylhäällä taivaissa ja alhaalla maassa.
verses.king_james: And as soon as we had heard these things, our hearts did melt, neither did there remain any more courage in any man, because of you: for the Lord your God, he is God in heaven above, and in earth beneath.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc ergo jurate mihi per Dominum, ut quomodo ego misericordiam feci vobiscum, ita et vos faciatis cum domo patris mei : detisque mihi verum signum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֗ה הִשָּֽׁבְעוּ־נָ֥א לִי֙ בַּֽיהֹוָ֔ה כִּֽי־עָשִׂ֥יתִי עִמָּכֶ֖ם חָ֑סֶד וַעֲשִׂיתֶ֨ם גַּם־אַתֶּ֜ם עִם־בֵּ֤ית אָבִי֙ חֶ֔סֶד וּנְתַתֶּ֥ם לִ֖י א֥וֹת אֱמֶֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now, therefore, swear ye to me by the Lord, that as I have shewed mercy to you, so you also will shew mercy to my father's house: and give me a true token.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin vannokaat nyt minulle Herran kautta, sillä minä tein armon teidän kohtaanne, että te myös teette armon minun isäni huoneelle ja annatte minulle totuuden merkin,
verses.king_james: Now therefore, I pray you, swear unto me by the Lord, since I have shewed you kindness, that ye will also shew kindness unto my father’s house, and give me a true token:

verses.latin_vulgate: ut salvetis patrem meum et matrem, et fratres ac sorores meas, et omnia quæ illorum sunt, et eruatis animas nostras a morte.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַחֲיִתֶ֞ם אֶת־אָבִ֣י וְאֶת־אִמִּ֗י וְאֶת־אַחַי֙ וְאֶת־[אַחְיוֹתַ֔י] (אחותי) וְאֵ֖ת כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר לָהֶ֑ם וְהִצַּלְתֶּ֥ם אֶת־נַפְשֹׁתֵ֖ינוּ מִמָּֽוֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: That you will save my father and mother, my brethren and sisters, and all things that are theirs, and deliver our souls from death.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että te jätätte elämään minun isäni, ja äitini, ja veljeni, ja sisareni, ja kaikki jotka heidän omansa ovat ja vapahdatte meidän sielumme kuolemasta.
verses.king_james: And that ye will save alive my father, and my mother, and my brethren, and my sisters, and all that they have, and deliver our lives from death.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui responderunt ei : Anima nostra sit pro vobis in mortem, si tamen non prodideris nos : cumque tradiderit nobis Dominus terram, faciemus in te misericordiam et veritatem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֧אמְרוּ לָ֣הּ הָאֲנָשִׁ֗ים נַפְשֵׁ֤נוּ תַחְתֵּיכֶם֙ לָמ֔וּת אִ֚ם לֹ֣א תַגִּ֔ידוּ אֶת־דְּבָרֵ֖נוּ זֶ֑ה וְהָיָ֗ה בְּתֵת־יְהֹוָ֥ה לָ֙נוּ֙ אֶת־הָאָ֔רֶץ וְעָשִׂ֥ינוּ עִמָּ֖ךְ חֶ֥סֶד וֶאֱמֶֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: They answered her: Be our lives for you unto death, only if thou betray us not. And when the Lord shall have delivered us the land, we will shew thee mercy and truth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja miehet sanoivat hänelle: meidän sielumme kuolkaan teidän edestänne, jolles vaan petä tätä meidän asiaamme, jollemme tee armoa ja totuutta sinua kohtaan, kuin Herra tämän maan meille antaa.
verses.king_james: And the men answered her, Our life for yours, if ye utter not this our business. And it shall be, when the Lord hath given us the land, that we will deal kindly and truly with thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Demisit ergo eos per funem de fenestra : domus enim ejus hærebat muro.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתּוֹרִדֵ֥ם בַּחֶ֖בֶל בְּעַ֣ד הַחַלּ֑וֹן כִּ֤י בֵיתָהּ֙ בְּקִ֣יר הַחוֹמָ֔ה וּבַחוֹמָ֖ה הִ֥יא יוֹשָֽׁבֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then she let them down with a cord out of a window: for her house joined close to the wall.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän laski heidät köydellä akkunasta alas; sillä hänen huoneensa oli kaupungin muurissa, ja hän asui juuri muurissa.
verses.king_james: Then she let them down by a cord through the window: for her house was upon the town wall, and she dwelt upon the wall.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque ad eos : Ad montana conscendite, ne forte occurrant vobis revertentes : ibique latitate tribus diebus, donec redeant, et sic ibitis per viam vestram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֹּ֤אמֶר לָהֶם֙ הָהָ֣רָה לֵּ֔כוּ פֶּֽן־יִפְגְּע֥וּ בָכֶ֖ם הָרֹֽדְפִ֑ים וְנַחְבֵּתֶ֨ם שָׁ֜מָּה שְׁלֹ֣שֶׁת יָמִ֗ים עַ֚ד שׁ֣וֹב הָרֹֽדְפִ֔ים וְאַחַ֖ר תֵּלְכ֥וּ לְדַרְכְּכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And she said to them: Get ye up to the mountains, lest perhaps they meet you as they return: and there lie ye hid three days, till they come back, and so you shall go on your way.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän sanoi heille: menkäät vuorelle, ettei ne teitä kohtaisi, jotka ajavat teitä takaa, ja olkaat siellä lymyssä kolme päivää, niinkauvan että takaa-ajajat palajavat, ja menkäät sitte tietänne.
verses.king_james: And she said unto them, Get you to the mountain, lest the pursuers meet you; and hide yourselves there three days, until the pursuers be returned: and afterward may ye go your way.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui dixerunt ad eam : Innoxii erimus a juramento hoc, quo adjurasti nos :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמְר֥וּ אֵלֶ֖יהָ הָאֲנָשִׁ֑ים נְקִיִּ֣ם אֲנַ֔חְנוּ מִשְּׁבֻעָתֵ֥ךְ הַזֶּ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר הִשְׁבַּעְתָּֽנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they said to her: We shall be blameless of this oath, which thou hast made us swear,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja miehet sanoivat hänelle: vapaat me olemme tästä valastas, jolla meitä vannotit.
verses.king_james: And the men said unto her, We will be blameless of this thine oath which thou hast made us swear.

verses.latin_vulgate: si ingredientibus nobis terram, signum fuerit funiculus iste coccineus, et ligaveris eum in fenestra, per quam demisisti nos : et patrem tuum ac matrem, fratresque et omnem cognationem tuam congregaveris in domum tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֛ה אֲנַ֥חְנוּ בָאִ֖ים בָּאָ֑רֶץ אֶת־תִּקְוַ֡ת חוּט֩ הַשָּׁנִ֨י הַזֶּ֜ה תִּקְשְׁרִ֗י בַּֽחַלּוֹן֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הוֹרַדְתֵּ֣נוּ ב֔וֹ וְאֶת־אָבִ֨יךְ וְאֶת־אִמֵּ֜ךְ וְאֶת־אַחַ֗יִךְ וְאֵת֙ כׇּל־בֵּ֣ית אָבִ֔יךְ תַּאַסְפִ֥י אֵלַ֖יִךְ הַבָּֽיְתָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: If, when we come into the land, this scarlet cord be a sign, and thou tie it in the window, by which thou hast let us down: and gather together thy father and mother, and brethren, and all thy kindred into thy house.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, kuin maahan sisälle tulemme, niin sinun pitää ripustaman tämän punaisen köyden akkunaan, josta meidät laskit alas, ja sinun pitää kokooman tykös huoneesees isäs ja äitis ja veljes ja koko isäs huoneen.
verses.king_james: Behold, when we come into the land, thou shalt bind this line of scarlet thread in the window which thou didst let us down by: and thou shalt bring thy father, and thy mother, and thy brethren, and all thy father’s household, home unto thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui ostium domus tuæ egressus fuerit, sanguis ipsius erit in caput ejus, et nos erimus alieni. Cunctorum autem sanguis, qui tecum in domo fuerint, redundabit in caput nostrum, si eos aliquis tetigerit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֡ה כֹּ֣ל אֲשֶׁר־יֵצֵא֩ מִדַּלְתֵ֨י בֵיתֵ֧ךְ ׀ הַח֛וּצָה דָּמ֥וֹ בְרֹאשׁ֖וֹ וַאֲנַ֣חְנוּ נְקִיִּ֑ם וְ֠כֹ֠ל אֲשֶׁ֨ר יִֽהְיֶ֤ה אִתָּךְ֙ בַּבַּ֔יִת דָּמ֣וֹ בְרֹאשֵׁ֔נוּ אִם־יָ֖ד תִּֽהְיֶה־בּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Whosoever shall go out of the door of thy house, his blood shall be upon his own head, and we shall be quit. But the blood of all that shall be with thee in the house, shall light upon our head, if any man touch them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta jos joku käy huonees ovesta ulos, hänen verensä olkoon oman päänsä päällä, ja me olemme viattomat; ja joka ikänä sinun kanssas huoneessa on, hänen verensä olkoon meidän päämme päällä, jos jonkun käsi häneen sattuu.
verses.king_james: And it shall be, that whosoever shall go out of the doors of thy house into the street, his blood shall be upon his head, and we will be guiltless: and whosoever shall be with thee in the house, his blood shall be on our head, if any hand be upon him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod si nos prodere volueris, et sermonem istum proferre in medium, erimus mundi ab hoc juramento, quo adjurasti nos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־תַּגִּ֖ידִי אֶת־דְּבָרֵ֣נוּ זֶ֑ה וְהָיִ֣ינוּ נְקִיִּ֔ם מִשְּׁבֻעָתֵ֖ךְ אֲשֶׁ֥ר הִשְׁבַּעְתָּֽנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But if thou wilt betray us, and utter this word abroad, we shall be quit of this oath, which thou hast made us swear.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan jos sinä petät tämän meidän asiamme, niin me olemme vapaat sinun valastas, jolla meitä vannottanut olet.
verses.king_james: And if thou utter this our business, then we will be quit of thine oath which thou hast made us to swear.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et illa respondit : Sicut locuti estis, ita fiat : dimittensque eos ut pergerent, appendit funiculum coccineum in fenestra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֹּ֙אמֶר֙ כְּדִבְרֵיכֶ֣ם כֶּן־ה֔וּא וַֽתְּשַׁלְּחֵ֖ם וַיֵּלֵ֑כוּ וַתִּקְשֹׁ֛ר אֶת־תִּקְוַ֥ת הַשָּׁנִ֖י בַּחַלּֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And she answered: As you have spoken, so be it done: and sending them on their way, she hung the scarlet cord in the window.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän vastasi: olkoon niinkuin te sanotte; ja päästi heidät menemään, ja he menivät pois; ja hän ripusti punaisen köyden akkunaan.
verses.king_james: And she said, According unto your words, so be it. And she sent them away, and they departed: and she bound the scarlet line in the window.

verses.latin_vulgate: Illi vero ambulantes pervenerunt ad montana, et manserunt ibi tres dies, donec reverterentur qui fuerant persecuti : quærentes enim per omnem viam, non repererunt eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּֽלְכוּ֙ וַיָּבֹ֣אוּ הָהָ֔רָה וַיֵּ֤שְׁבוּ שָׁם֙ שְׁלֹ֣שֶׁת יָמִ֔ים עַד־שָׁ֖בוּ הָרֹֽדְפִ֑ים וַיְבַקְשׁ֧וּ הָרֹדְפִ֛ים בְּכׇל־הַדֶּ֖רֶךְ וְלֹ֥א מָצָֽאוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But they went and came to the mountains, and stayed there three days, till they that pursued them were returned. For having sought them through all the way, they found them not.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he menivät pois, ja tulivat vuorelle ja olivat siellä kolme päivää, niinkauvan että ne palasivat, jotka heitä ajoivat takaa, jotka etsivät heitä kaikilla teillä, ja ei löytäneet.
verses.king_james: And they went, and came unto the mountain, and abode there three days, until the pursuers were returned: and the pursuers sought them throughout all the way, but found them not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quibus urbem ingressis, reversi sunt, et descenderunt exploratores de monte : et, transmisso Jordane, venerunt ad Josue filium Nun, narraveruntque ei omnia quæ acciderant sibi,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּשֻׁ֜בוּ שְׁנֵ֤י הָֽאֲנָשִׁים֙ וַיֵּרְד֣וּ מֵֽהָהָ֔ר וַיַּֽעַבְרוּ֙ וַיָּבֹ֔אוּ אֶל־יְהוֹשֻׁ֖עַ בִּן־נ֑וּן וַ֨יְסַפְּרוּ־ל֔וֹ אֵ֥ת כׇּל־הַמֹּצְא֖וֹת אוֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when they were gone back into the city, the spies returned, and came down from the mountain: and passing over the Jordan, they came to Joshua, the son of Nun, and told him all that befel them,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin ne molemmat miehet palasivat, sittekuin he olivat astuneet vuorelta alas, menivät ylitse, ja tulivat Josuan Nunin pojan tykö ja juttelivat hänelle kaikki, mitä heille tapahtunut oli.
verses.king_james: So the two men returned, and descended from the mountain, and passed over, and came to Joshua the son of Nun, and told him all things that befell them:

verses.latin_vulgate: atque dixerunt : Tradidit Dominus omnem terram hanc in manus nostras, et timore prostrati sunt cuncti habitatores ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּֽאמְרוּ֙ אֶל־יְהוֹשֻׁ֔עַ כִּֽי־נָתַ֧ן יְהֹוָ֛ה בְּיָדֵ֖נוּ אֶת־כׇּל־הָאָ֑רֶץ וְגַם־נָמֹ֛גוּ כׇּל־יֹשְׁבֵ֥י הָאָ֖רֶץ מִפָּנֵֽינוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And said: the Lord hath delivered all this land into our hands, and all the inhabitants thereof are overthrown with fear.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he sanoivat Josualle: Herra on antanut meidän käsiimme koko maan, sillä kaikki maan asuvaiset ovat hämmästyneet meidän edessämme.
verses.king_james: And they said unto Joshua, Truly the Lord hath delivered into our hands all the land; for even all the inhabitants of the country do faint because of us.
